info.name: NC Connector for mail integration
info.summary: Secure file sharing, Talk links and attachment automation directly in your familiar email client.
info.description:
# NC Connector for mail integration
NC Connector for mail integration provides the NC Connector backend for secure Nextcloud sharing, Talk meetings, and attachment automation directly in Thunderbird and Outlook Classic.
## What it solves
- No constant switching between browser and mail client - No manual copy/paste of links, passwords, or expiry details - More consistent behavior across teams through central defaults and overrides
## Core capabilities
### Share directly while composing
- Guided share flow with files, expiry date, and note - Password-protected uploads - Formatted share block with URL, password, rights, and expiry - Optional separate password email
### Automate attachment handling
- “Always share via NC Connector” mode - Upload offer above a configurable size threshold - Clear yes/no threshold decision - ZIP download-link mode with read-only recipient handling
### Plan Talk meetings from the calendar
- Create and update Talk rooms from calendar events - Configure room type, lobby, password, and moderation - Keep title and meeting link aligned with event changes - Cleanup for moved or cancelled events
## Backend mode
Seat assignment is handled in the Nextcloud backend. One seat maps to one Nextcloud user and can be reassigned at any time.
With backend mode, admins get:
- Seat assignment and central policy control for mail-client settings - Separate password delivery workflow - Per-user overrides for seat users - Custom text and design templates for Share and Talk - Visual editors with preview for templates
Without backend mode, users can still start directly in the mail client, but there is no central seat management, no backend-controlled policies, and no backend-managed templates.
## Template customization
Admins can customize:
- Share email template (HTML) - Share password email template (HTML) - Talk invitation template
Available template variables:
- `{URL}` - `{PASSWORD}` - `{EXPIRATIONDATE}` - `{RIGHTS}` - `{NOTE}` - `{MEETING_URL}`
## For admins
- Works with existing Nextcloud infrastructure - Central defaults and policy enforcement - Per-user overrides for seat users - Structured logs for support and troubleshooting
info.author: NC Connector
